en_title: Double Fine and Compulsion Confirm Status Following Xbox Cuts, Get to Keep Franchises Such as Psychonauts and South of Midnight
cn_title: XBOX裁员后Double Fine和Compulsion独立，保留《意航员》《午夜之南》
subtitle: 系列得以保留
opus_summary: Double Fine和Compulsion Games发布公开声明，确认两家工作室在XBOX大规模裁员后的去向：它们不会关闭，但也将离开XBOX Game Studios，重新成为独立工作室。

paragraphs.en: Double Fine and Compulsion Games have issued public statements to confirm their status following word of today's enormous cuts by Xbox, discussing their respective futures as independent studios.
paragraphs.cn: 在今天XBOX大规模裁员的消息传出后，Double Fine和Compulsion Games发布公开声明，确认各自的现状，并谈及它们作为独立工作室的未来。

paragraphs.en: While neither company will be shut down, neither will be part of Xbox Game Studios going forward either 鈥?and in , Xbox CEO Asha Sharma made no mention of how either company's workforce would also be impacted by their move to independence.
paragraphs.cn: 两家公司都不会关闭，但今后也都不再属于XBOX Game Studios。在相关说明中，XBOX CEO Asha Sharma并未提到两家公司转为独立后，其员工规模会受到怎样的影响。

paragraphs.en: Both Double Fine and Compulsion have been independent studios before, prior to their purchase by Microsoft during its company-buying spree 鈥?a bid to find firms who would help fill the Xbox Game Pass catalogue. Each developer will now return to independent status, with no word on what either studio will now work on. Both companies will be able to keep access to their existing franchises, however, and Sharma said they both have "runway for their next games."
paragraphs.cn: Double Fine和Compulsion此前都曾是独立工作室，直到微软在一轮工作室收购潮中买下它们，以寻找能够扩充XBOX Game Pass阵容的团队。现在，两家开发商都将回归独立状态，但目前尚未说明它们接下来会开发什么。不过，两家公司都能够继续使用现有系列，Sharma也表示它们都拥有「下一款游戏的缓冲空间」。

paragraphs.en: Founded in 2000 by legendary LucasArts developer Tim Schafer, Double Fine is known for a string of indie hits such as Psychonauts, Br眉tal Legend, Costume Quest, and the hugely-successful Kickstarter project Broken Age. Over the past 12 months, the studio released its first new games for several years 鈥?colorful adventure Keeper and multiplayer pottery brawler Kiln 鈥?though neither found widespread success.
paragraphs.cn: Double Fine由传奇LucasArts开发者Tim Schafer于2000年创立，以《意航员》《野兽传奇》《万圣节大作战》以及大获成功的Kickstarter项目《破碎时光》等一系列独立佳作闻名。过去12个月里，这家工作室推出了数年来的首批新作：色彩鲜明的冒险游戏《Keeper》和多人陶艺乱斗游戏《Kiln》，不过两者都没有获得广泛成功。

paragraphs.en: "Once again, Double Fine Productions will be an independent studio," the company said in a statement posted to X/Twitter, jointly signed off by Schafer. "We're thankful to everyone at Xbox for seven great years together, and for working with us to reach an outcome which preserves our history and culture, and returns ownership of our games to us.
paragraphs.cn: 该公司在X/Twitter上发布并由Schafer共同署名的声明中表示：「Double Fine Productions将再次成为一家独立工作室。我们感谢XBOX的每一个人，感谢这七年来的美好合作，也感谢他们与我们一起达成了一个能够保留我们历史和文化、并将游戏所有权归还给我们的结果。」

paragraphs.en: "To everyone who has reached out to us these past few weeks: Thank you so much for all your kind words, we've been deeply touched by all your messages. We will share more news soon on what comes next. Your continued support is greatly appreciated."
paragraphs.cn: 「致过去几周联系过我们的每一个人：非常感谢你们温暖的话语，你们的留言让我们深受感动。关于下一步计划，我们很快会分享更多消息。我们非常感谢你们一直以来的支持。」

paragraphs.en: The younger Compulsion Games, meanwhile, is known for a smaller roster of titles including Contrast, We Happy Few, and most recently its artful adventure South of Midnight.
paragraphs.cn: 相比之下，更年轻的Compulsion Games作品数量较少，代表作包括《Contrast》《少数幸运儿》，以及最新推出、颇具艺术风格的冒险游戏《午夜之南》。

paragraphs.en: "When Compulsion Games was founded in 2009 as an interdependent studio, we were just a few dreamers in a leaky gramophone factory devoted to creating rich storylines and experiences that felt handcrafted," the company began in a similar statement posted to X/Twitter. "We care about the craft of making games, the stories we tell, the players who experience them, and the assembled creators who put their heart and soul into doing something different.
paragraphs.cn: Compulsion Games也在X/Twitter发布了类似声明，开头写道：「Compulsion Games于2009年作为一家独立工作室创立时，我们只是几个在漏水的留声机工厂里做梦的人，致力于创造丰富的故事线，以及带有手工质感的体验。我们在乎游戏制作这门手艺，在乎我们讲述的故事，在乎体验这些故事的玩家，也在乎那些聚在一起、全心全意做出不同东西的创作者。」

paragraphs.en: "Today, we're sharing that Compulsion Games will return to independent management following our time as part of Xbox. As part of this transition, we will retain the rights to Contrast, We Happy Few, and our award-winning South of Midnight. We're grateful for the years we spent with Xbox, for the support they provided our team, and for the opportunity to bring these games to players around the world. As an independent studio, we're excited to continue building the distinctive games that define Compulsion while taking the next steps in our journey.
paragraphs.cn: 「今天，我们宣布Compulsion Games在作为XBOX一员的时期结束后，将回归独立管理。作为这次过渡的一部分，我们将保留《Contrast》《少数幸运儿》以及获奖作品《午夜之南》的权利。我们感谢与XBOX共度的这些年，感谢他们为我们团队提供的支持，也感谢他们给了我们把这些游戏带给全球玩家的机会。作为一家独立工作室，我们很高兴能继续打造定义Compulsion的独特游戏，同时迈出旅程的下一步。」

paragraphs.en: "Our immediate priority is to support our team throughout this transition period. We are confident in the future of Compulsion Games and look forward to this next chapter where one thing will remain constant: we will create unique games that tell important stories, all with the goal of touching the hearts and minds of our players."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们眼下的优先事项，是在整个过渡期支持我们的团队。我们对Compulsion Games的未来充满信心，也期待新的篇章。在这个篇章中，有一点不会改变：我们会创作讲述重要故事的独特游戏，目标始终是触动玩家的内心与思想。」

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
